review_title: Great product; great team... and our customers love GoSquared too!
description: Helps our customers understand how to get the most from the websites they create using our software and therefore makes our product work better and our customers happier.
author: Jenefer T.
pros: That it enables you to do something with your website analytics, not just see what the stats are. Smart Groups for automated reporting and targeted messaging is an especially cool feature. The team are awesome, very friendly and helpful to us and our customers. As a software provider ourselves, we only recommend tech that we think to be great, like GoSquared.
cons: It could be better geared for enterprise customers. (We provide GoSquared access to all our customers so that they can get the best from the websites they build using our tech.) Sometimes it could be easier to manage all of our customers' accounts simultaneously.

review_title: GoSquared are our go to platform for realtime people analytics and integration for our clietns.
description: Instead of us building a real-time analytics platform or having to customise and integrate something into our backend we have been able to use GS for a key feature-set as a value add for our clients with tight integration into Zapnito.
author: Charles T.
pros: Simplicity, performance and integration services. GoSquared also provide excellent and friendly support and services. GS provide great tools for learning more about customers and a simple interface with great dashboards and plug-ins. We recommend GS as an add-on to all our accounts.
cons: More white-label and multi-tenant features for enterprise clients. There are not alot of cons I can think of besides the above.

review_title: Required to contact customer service to upgrade, but customer service does not exist...
author: Asger E.
pros: It doesn't matter what i like, because I can't use the software. After I paid, they require me to contact customer service to use the product. Customer service does not exist.
cons: The company itself builtin the greatest growth reduction they could, which is a requirement to contact their, non-existing, customer service to upgrade or even use the plan. This after you even pay, they will take away features from you until you contact their customer service, which AGAIN DOES NOT REPLY.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Product Knowledge is everything! GoSquared delivers this!!!!!!
description: I have been able to link GoSquared from my website to my email marketing system. It has been able to change our business. I can now send emails to a selected group rather than to mass.
author: Sunil C.
pros: The software allows SMEs and larger corporations to build relationships with particular groups of individuals. I love how this integrates with Zapier. CSR have terrific product knowledge which makes even a novice find the product easy to navigate. If you want an easy CRM system that builds relationships with your clients; get yourself GoSquared.
cons: Improve its integrations with wordpress so we can link in more elements of personalisation.

review_title: Works like a charm!
description: We got to know a ton of information about our users use of our platform: hourly usage, peak times, geographical info, most active pages, etc. As opposed to Google Analytics you can view a lot of detailed info in real time. If you enable and use the "People Analytics" you can pinpoint the behavior of specific users. Extremely useful!
author: Alejandro P.
pros: GoSquared provides us with real time visitor analytics of our SaaS platform's usage. Setting it up is a breeze and you're able to view the results right away. We mostly use it for analytics but they have other great features that we have not explored yet.

review_title: A great tool, that we couldn't live without!
author: Ash P.
pros: The dashboard is incredible. Everything I want to know about my analytics is there. The chat tool is also invaluable for us in converting leads and ensuring current customers are managed extremely well.
cons: It could be a tiny bit cheaper, but then they have to make money somehow! They've been kind enough to offer our community a deal on their subscription to help startups to get started with them. We think that's pretty cool!

review_title: Great Product!
description: Overall, it worked for our company in the early stages of our user numbers, but at some point we outgrew it and had to look to other solutions. However, every new project that starts internally launches with Gsquared as their go-to tool for user insight.
author: ESEOSA I.
pros: - First off, ease of integration with 3rd-party tools such as Zapier is a big plus - Setup is not a big headache - Great for real-time analytics on site visitor activity - The live-chat feature works like a charm too
cons: - I would say it is most ideal for small-to-medium scale operations and not so much for enterprise applications, so control expectations when adopting as you consider your scale of operations That's about it really, as long as you don't apply for the wrong scale of operations, you'll have a great time.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Finally! Website analytics that make sense!
description: I actually enjoy monitoring my website analytics thanks to GoSquared!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: GoSquared provides historical and real-time website analytics that are easy to understand and filter through. Their support team is super responsive and great to work with.
cons: Pricing can get a bit expensive, especially when you start turning on some of their newer features. While their quality of service is better than competitors, their pricing is much higher.

review_title: All in one system
author: Jose Asdrubal M.
pros: As a chat system, it works great, it allows you to contact clients back, once chat is closed, also allows supervisors to jump into the chat if help needed.
cons: None, that I can think, probably it is a little bit expensive.

review_title: Easy to use and easy to master
author: Louise S.
pros: The live chat (and app) and analytics that are easy to understand. I also like how you can drill down to the individual level for website visitors and see their user journey and profile information
cons: You can also track twitter followers at this stage but gosquared are super receptive to changes and updates base don user requirement

review_title: I am using the product to know about visitors on my web site and it does the job perfectly.
description: I can see the impact of postings on Linked-In on the activity on my web page.
author: Louis B.
pros: Simple to use by adding some data in my web site. I am using NotePad++ to insert the data at the right place into the code of each page of the web site. My need being limited this is all I need to do. I get a daily reports about visitors by email. Then I can go to the web site to have more details.
cons: Nothing to dislike in my case. It cannot be easier to use. Perhaps I could find problems if I was using all the features; but it seems rather well done.

review_title: Entirely positive
author: David S.
pros: I like the ease of access and attractive presentation of data. A single click reveals the key information at a glance. Many websites over-complicate matters, making it hard for users to find what they need. GoSquared keeps things simple, enabling the essential numbers to be obtained in seconds.
cons: I have no substantive criticisms. If one were nitpicking , one could perhaps see scope for improvement in the design of the time-series graphs.

review_title: Excellent alternative to Intercom
description: We've been using GoSquared for the past couple of years and the team have created an excellent product. It's incredibly useful for tracking user journeys and locating the exact pain point; aligning analytics with the CRM is essential too, as it help us understand a customer's individual life cycle. Live chat changed the game for us too, allowing us to interact with customers wherever we may be. The moment I was able to convert a visitor into a signup from the comfort of a pub, all while sipping on a pint of beer, I fell in love with GoSquared!
author: Steve M.

review_title: The Red Bull for Business
description: These people understand you. They treat you as if you were they're only customer. They're honest about outages but are constantly pushing the product forward. Love love love GoSquared. Cannot say enough good about them.
author: Tyler V.
pros: Customer support. Extremely wide range of business solutions without a feeling of bloat.

review_title: GoSquared is a powerful, simple-to-set-up alternative to Google Analytics.
description: GoSquared is a powerful, high-quality analytics suite that is well worth spending the money on.
author: Jonathan S.
pros: GoSquared is powerful and very easy to set up. It allows you to drill in an analyze website traffic by source, region, pages, and social content in a summarized dashboard that provides value not just for marketing teams but for key stakeholders throughout the organization.
cons: While GoSquared is powerful and simple there were some strange data discrepancies between total visitors and Google Analytics that we could never properly reconcile. That aside, it is a great premium product for getting answers quickly.

review_title: lightweight web crm solution with smart groups and nice interface
description: support for smart groups and easy management contacts in automated way
author: Aleksei T.
pros: cheap price and feature-reach solution simple integration and support for universal segment.io tool
cons: missed companies entities in data structure integration with only some essential external services instead of built-in support for this features
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: From initial review to implementation has been amazing. Customer support outstanding.
description: It's far too addictive. Just trying to understand all of the data has been our biggest hurdle.
author: Scott W.
pros: The analytics are the best I have ever seen. We are able to get information about our website activity in real-time and has allowed us to tailor our activity. The chat feature has also helped us generate new customers easily.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Very easy to setup and use to track visitors to web app or website.
author: Rocko S.
pros: The product is very easy to setup and use. We utilize it to track website and web app traffic, use the chat functionality, engagement time, etc. The dashboards are beautiful and easy to understand.

review_title: Reliable. Simple. Can't Live Without It.
description: We absolutely love GoSquared! Tracking data is easy to understand and instant, which is huge when trying to watch live customer flow patterns. Also, just started using the API's to create our own offline reports and it's fantastic!
author: Travis R.
pros: The API's are extremely powerful and a great feature.
cons: I would like the mobile version to be improved. There are a few issues that we have found, but honestly have failed to report because they are so minor. And we can always get what we need on the desktop version.

review_title: What's not to like? Everything you need, presented beautifully.
author: Adam W.
pros: Ease of use, outstanding UI and UX. Responsiveness of the team (I can't believe how much of my wish list has been implemented). The fact they take the time to understand how customers use the product and try to make it work for all them and their attention to detail completely astounds me. They're the tech company I wish I was. The best tool in its field.
cons: Struggling to think of one. It would appear there isn't anything I don't like about it. Price may be a con for some but the current pricing structure as at time of writing review is in my mind spot on.

review_title: GoSquared cares about their customers
description: We get a lot more insight about who is on our website and have seen an uptick in attendance to our taster sessions. I probably don't have time to try and sort out all the features and see how they can work for me but I do know that the GoSquared team will help me optimise the features when I'm ready.
author: Joy F.
pros: I love the fact that the team behing GoSquared is always looking for ways to improve it so that the customer gets what they need. They were great in helping us to get set up and want us to succeed using it.

review_title: Chat with ease
description: From the first week of using GoSquared we have had an increase in customer contact, the ease of use means that I don't have to spend hours teaching my colleagues how to use it I can just add them to a project and 5 minutes later they are answering chat messages. I would highly recommend adding GoSquared chat feature to any sales website.
author: Charlotte B.
pros: Really easy to install and great interface which is fully customisable
cons: Could link to a database so it can be used as a forensics tool
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Game Changer
author: David S.
pros: It's an incredible tool. It turns marketing and customer services the right way round. If you want to use your website to create meaningful engagements with customers (whatever your business) you need to integrate GoSquared.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excellent experience. Quality platform and very solid livechat
author: Alex N.
pros: Solid and stable livechat Good mobile app Excellent performance Excellent support Great pricing model
cons: Nothing special. Maybe the analytics dashboard, would like to see a more cleaner design of the interface.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: This is a programme that is so easy to pick up with such clever capabilities
description: I have only had a short experience of the platform however as a rule I have picked up the processes and functions quickly and easily
author: Maxwell I.
pros: The individual analytics of specific users on our Zapnito platform. Being able to see who is on the site is especially useful for a real-time response to customer queries and even prospect assisting
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
